purpose: Single-local-Nemo runtime baseline with deterministic prefiltering and small finalist batch review.
principles: Score the full active universe deterministically in code.
Send only the top finalists to local Nemo.
Do not let local Nemo rank the full 20-symbol universe directly.
Keep economics and risk gates deterministic.

not_recommended.full_20_symbol_local_batch: Too fragile and too heavy for local 9B runtime.

readiness_dependencies: Stable batch_nemo cycles at top-5 finalist load
Clean account sync and order reconciliation
notes: Treat this as the target operating shape, not as proof of readiness to fund the system more.
Apply changes gradually and validate through live logs plus replay where possible.
